notifications.title: CLEAVE v3.2.4.0 is available
notifications.message: Critical "Postload Only" fidelity fix, Multiple File Reconciliation, Custom Group Split, the unmatched-key Drop action, per-unit sheet tab colors, and workflow polish. Update for the latest.

notifications.title: What's new in CLEAVE v3.2.4.0
notifications.message: Reconcile is now Multiple-File: reconcile several file sets into ONE workbook with a leading Overview sheet, per-unit tab colors, and double-click rename. Plus a critical "Postload Only" fidelity fix; unmatched keys can now Exclude / Drop / Include; Custom Group Split with "separate sheets vs separate files" for both split modes; drag-and-drop reordering; and quick paths that open the picker right where you saved them.
